apiKeyClearedStatus: API key will be cleared on save
apiKeyDescription: Write-only — sealed in the secret store and never displayed. A provider without a key cannot serve until one is set.
defaultTestPrompt: Reply with the single word: ok
deleteProviderDescription: Delete “{{token}}” and its API key? This is refused while any tier or tenant is still granted the provider — remove those grants first.
description: AI models registered on this instance. Registering one does not offer it to anyone — grant it to a tier, under AI packaging, to put it on those tenants’ menu.
dirtyTestWarning: You have unsaved changes. This tests the last saved configuration — save first to test your edits.
emptyProviders: No providers yet. Create one, then grant it to a tier to enable NL→rule authoring for those tenants.
enabledHint: — a disabled provider stays listed but never serves a call.
endpointDescription: Override the kind's default base URL (self-hosted / proxied). Blank = the built-in default.
endpointInvalidError: Endpoint must be an http(s) URL, or blank for the kind default.
kindDescription: The provider implementation. `anthropic` is the shipped kind at GA.
noApiKeyWarning: No API key is configured — set and save one on the Connection tab before testing.
paramsDescription: Opaque per-kind tuning as a JSON object (e.g. output-token cap), or blank.
paramsInvalidJsonError: Params must be valid JSON, or blank.
paramsNotObjectError: Params must be a JSON object (like { "temperature": 0.2 }).
testProviderDescription: Run a prompt live through this provider’s endpoint and key to validate it. This is an operator smoke test — it does not apply the per-tenant external-routing consent gate.
title: AI Providers
